Title: Cherry Blossoms After Winter
Actors: Jinwook Ok, Kang Hui, Kim Hyun-wook
Plot: Ever since his parents passed away, Hae Bom has been living in Tae Sung's house. And now, being a 12th grader, he enters the same class as Tae Sung, which makes the whole situation way more awkward. Living together 24/7, Tae Sung and Hae Bom's relationship is bound to change.
